raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of and attached to box_1, so lifting box_1 directly risks lifting both or causing tearing/tipping. The left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 and apply downward constraint without colliding with the table or box edges.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is constrained against the tabletop/box_1 stack (preventing it from following box_1), reducing the risk of the two boxes moving together during separation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The claw cannot be used because boxes are 30 cm and exceed the 10 cm claw limit. The right arm has clear lateral access to box_1’s sides (not blocked by box_2 or the table edge) and can form a stable pinch/clamp with the end-effector housing without crushing the cardboard.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector with sufficient control to apply lifting/peeling force while box_2 remains stabilized."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With box_2 stabilized, a controlled lateral micro-motion of box_1 is possible to break the attachment interface without dragging box_2. There is free space on the table to laterally shift box_1 a few centimeters without colliding with other objects (only the table is nearby).",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is weakened/broken; box_1 is laterally offset relative to box_2, creating separation for a safe lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is now separated enough from box_2 to lift without snagging. Dual-arm grasp is required because the object is large (30 cm) and cannot be held with the claw; both arms have lateral access to opposite sides of box_1 without contacting box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (darker box) is securely grasped by both end-effectors and is ready to be lifted from the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is fully supported by the dual-arm grasp; the left arm can safely reduce pressure on box_2 without causing box_2 to shift or tip.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is no longer constrained by the left end-effector; box_1 remains under secure control by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of and attached to box_1, so lifting box_1 directly risks lifting both or causing tearing/tipping. The left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 and apply downward constraint without colliding with the table or box edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is constrained against the tabletop/box_1 stack (preventing it from following box_1), reducing the risk of the two boxes moving together during separation.

parsed_json.Precondition: The claw cannot be used because boxes are 30 cm and exceed the 10 cm claw limit. The right arm has clear lateral access to box_1’s sides (not blocked by box_2 or the table edge) and can form a stable pinch/clamp with the end-effector housing without crushing the cardboard.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector with sufficient control to apply lifting/peeling force while box_2 remains stabilized.

parsed_json.Precondition: With box_2 stabilized, a controlled lateral micro-motion of box_1 is possible to break the attachment interface without dragging box_2. There is free space on the table to laterally shift box_1 a few centimeters without colliding with other objects (only the table is nearby).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is weakened/broken; box_1 is laterally offset relative to box_2, creating separation for a safe lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is now separated enough from box_2 to lift without snagging. Dual-arm grasp is required because the object is large (30 cm) and cannot be held with the claw; both arms have lateral access to opposite sides of box_1 without contacting box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (darker box) is securely grasped by both end-effectors and is ready to be lifted from the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is fully supported by the dual-arm grasp; the left arm can safely reduce pressure on box_2 without causing box_2 to shift or tip.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is no longer constrained by the left end-effector; box_1 remains under secure control by the robot.
